reviews.comment:
Excelente atención,  reciben la app ypf, shop surtido, de Villa Unión  hacia San Juan por la 40 es la opción para cargar combustible, no hay otra en ese tramo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, they accept the YPF app, shop assortment, from Villa Unión towards San Juan on Route 40 it's the only option to refuel, there's no other on that stretch.
